since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.47% · Gold +1.61% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.16%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.16%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.79%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.79%, PLTR +3.51%, AMAT +2.89%, CHKP +2.75%, LRCX +2.24%. Laggards: BIDU -3.63%, PUBM -2.68%, CRNC -1.47%, ZS -1.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.43% at $159.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
